mapper.select: select count(*) from members

select member_id, name, nickname, email, status, created_at, role, last_login_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count, 0 as report_count, 0 as post_count, 0 as comment_count from members order by created_at desc

select p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.visibility, p.deleted_yn, p.emotion_id, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, p.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, 0 as comment_count, 0 as hashtag_count from post_tbl p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id order by p.created_at desc limit 500

select c.comment_id, c.post_id, coalesce(p.title, '제목 없음') as post_title, c.content, c.deleted_yn, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, c.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, c.parent_id, case when c.deleted_yn = 'Y' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from comment_tbl c left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id left join members m on m.member_id = c.member_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'COMMENT' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = c.comment_id order by c.created_at desc limit 500

select c.comment_id, c.post_id, coalesce(p.title, '제목 없음') as post_title, c.content, c.deleted_yn, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, c.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, c.parent_id, case when c.deleted_yn = 'Y' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from comment_tbl c left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id left join members m on m.member_id = c.member_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'COMMENT' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = c.comment_id where c.comment_id = #{commentId} limit 1

select h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, coalesce(h.use_count, 0) as use_count, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as post_count, date_format(max(p.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as latest_post_created_at, case when latest_log.action_type = 'DELETE' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from hashtag h left join post_hashtag ph on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'HASHTAG' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'DELETE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = h.hashtag_id group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, h.use_count, latest_log.action_type order by post_count desc, h.hashtag asc limit 500

select h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, coalesce(h.use_count, 0) as use_count, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as post_count, date_format(max(p.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as latest_post_created_at, case when latest_log.action_type = 'DELETE' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from hashtag h left join post_hashtag ph on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'HASHTAG' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'DELETE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = h.hashtag_id where h.hashtag_id = #{hashtagId} group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, h.use_count, latest_log.action_type limit 1

select p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.visibility, p.deleted_yn, p.emotion_id, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, p.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, coalesce(( select count(*) from comment_tbl c where c.post_id = p.post_id and c.deleted_yn = 'N' ), 0) as comment_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from post_hashtag ph where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), 0) as hashtag_count from post_tbl p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id where p.post_id = #{postId} limit 1
mapper.update: update post_tbl set visibility = 'PRIVATE', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set visibility = 'PUBLIC', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'N', visibility = 'PUBLIC', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'Y'
update comment_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y' where comment_id = #{commentId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update comment_tbl set deleted_yn = 'N' where comment_id = #{commentId} and deleted_yn = 'Y'
mapper.select: select count(*) as total_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when role in ('USER', 'MEMBER') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as normal_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when role in ('ADMIN', 'NORMAL_ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN') then 1 else 0 end), 0) as admin_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'SUSPENDED' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as suspended_member_count from members
select member_id, name, nickname, email, status, role, created_at, null as action_type, null as action_detail from members order by created_at desc limit 1

select coalesce(target.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target.name, target.nickname, target.email, target.status, target.role, log.created_at, log.action_type, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members target on target.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 1

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE', 'SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 10

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE', 'SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc

select member_id, email, name, nickname, phone, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1

select member_id, name, nickname, email, status, created_at, role, last_login_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count, 0 as report_count, 0 as post_count, 0 as comment_count from members where status = 'ACTIVE' and role in ('USER', 'MEMBER', 'ADMIN', 'NORMAL_ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN') and ( #{keyword} = '' or
name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
) order by created_at desc limit 100
mapper.update: update members set role = #{role}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and role in ('USER', 'MEMBER', 'ADMIN', 'NORMAL_ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN')

update members set status = 'SUSPENDED', suspended_until = #{suspendedUntil}, suspension_count = coalesce(suspension_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_at is null
update members set status = 'ACTIVE', suspended_until = null, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'SUSPENDED' and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into admin_action_logs ( admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, created_at, action_detail ) values ( #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{actionDetail} )
mapper.select: select (select count(*) from members) as total_member_count, (select count(*) from members where created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) as today_new_member_count, (select count(*) from post_tbl where deleted_yn = 'N') as post_count

select p.emotion_id, count(*) as activity_count from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.emotion_id is not null and ( (#{period} = 'day' and p.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and p.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and p.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) ) group by p.emotion_id order by p.emotion_id

choose.when: with recursive day_numbers(day_index) as ( select 0 union all select day_index + 1 from day_numbers where day_index < 6 ), hour_numbers(hour_index) as ( select 0 union all select hour_index + 1 from hour_numbers where hour_index < 23 ), day_hour_slots as ( select date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day), interval d.day_index day) as slot_date, h.hour_index from day_numbers d cross join hour_numbers h ), hourly_counts as ( select s.slot_date, s.hour_index, count(distinct l.member_id) as hourly_active_count from day_hour_slots s left join login_audit_logs l on l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date_add(s.slot_date, interval s.hour_index hour) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(s.slot_date, interval (s.hour_index + 1) hour) group by s.slot_date, s.hour_index ) select concat(lpad(hour_index, 2, '0'), '시') as label, round(avg(hourly_active_count), 1) as active_user_count from hourly_counts group by hour_index order by hour_index

with recursive day_numbers(day_index) as ( select 0 union all select day_index + 1 from day_numbers where day_index < 27 ), hour_numbers(hour_index) as ( select 0 union all select hour_index + 1 from hour_numbers where hour_index < 23 ), day_hour_slots as ( select floor(d.day_index / 7) + 1 as week_index, date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 27 day), interval d.day_index day) as slot_date, h.hour_index from day_numbers d cross join hour_numbers h ), hourly_counts as ( select s.week_index, s.slot_date, s.hour_index, count(distinct l.member_id) as hourly_active_count from day_hour_slots s left join login_audit_logs l on l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date_add(s.slot_date, interval s.hour_index hour) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(s.slot_date, interval (s.hour_index + 1) hour) group by s.week_index, s.slot_date, s.hour_index ), weekly_hour_averages as ( select week_index, hour_index, avg(hourly_active_count) as weekly_hour_average_count from hourly_counts group by week_index, hour_index ) select concat(lpad(hour_index, 2, '0'), '시') as label, round(avg(weekly_hour_average_count), 1) as active_user_count from weekly_hour_averages group by hour_index order by hour_index
choose.otherwise: with recursive hour_numbers(hour_index) as ( select 0 union all select hour_index + 1 from hour_numbers where hour_index < 23 ) select concat(lpad(h.hour_index, 2, '0'), '시') as label, cast(count(distinct l.member_id) as decimal(10, 1)) as active_user_count from hour_numbers h left join login_audit_logs l on l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval h.hour_index hour) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval (h.hour_index + 1) hour) group by h.hour_index order by h.hour_index

mapper.select:
select * from ( select 'JOINED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 44032, 51077 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.created_at from members m where m.created_at is not null
union all
select 'DELETED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 53448, 53748 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.deleted_at as created_at from members m where m.deleted_at is not null
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' then 'SUSPENDED' else 'RESTORED' end as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') ) recent_activity where created_at is not null order by created_at desc limit 10

select * from ( select 'JOINED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 44032, 51077 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.created_at from members m where m.created_at is not null
union all
select 'DELETED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 53448, 53748 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.deleted_at as created_at from members m where m.deleted_at is not null
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' then 'SUSPENDED' else 'RESTORED' end as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') ) recent_activity where created_at is not null order by created_at desc

select (select count(*) from members) as total_member_count, (select count(*) from members m where m.created_at is not null and ( (#{period} = 'day' and m.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and m.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and m.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and m.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and m.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and m.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) )) as new_member_count, (select count(distinct l.member_id) from login_audit_logs l where l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and ( (#{period} = 'day' and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) )) as active_user_count, (select count(*) from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( (#{period} = 'day' and p.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and p.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and p.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) )) as post_count, (select count(*) from comment_tbl c join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id where c.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( (#{period} = 'day' and c.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and c.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and c.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and c.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and c.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and c.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) )) as comment_count, (select count(*) from user_post_like l join post_tbl p on p.post_id = l.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( (#{period} = 'day' and l.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and l.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and l.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and l.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and l.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and l.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) )) as empathy_count

choose.when: with recursive day_numbers(day_index) as ( select 0 union all select day_index + 1 from day_numbers where day_index < 6 ) select date_format(date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day), interval d.day_index day), '%m/%d') as label, count(m.member_id) as value from day_numbers d left join members m on m.created_at >= date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day), interval d.day_index day) and m.created_at < date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day), interval (d.day_index + 1) day) group by d.day_index order by d.day_index

with recursive week_numbers(week_index) as ( select 0 union all select week_index + 1 from week_numbers where week_index < 3 ) select concat(week_index + 1, CHAR(51452, 52264 USING utf8mb4)) as label, count(m.member_id) as value from week_numbers left join members m on m.created_at >= date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 27 day), interval (week_index * 7) day) and m.created_at < date_add(date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 27 day), interval ((week_index + 1) * 7) day) group by week_index order by week_index
choose.otherwise: with recursive hour_numbers(hour_index) as ( select 0 union all select hour_index + 1 from hour_numbers where hour_index < 23 ) select concat(lpad(h.hour_index, 2, '0'), '시') as label, count(m.member_id) as value from hour_numbers h left join members m on m.created_at >= date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval h.hour_index hour) and m.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval (h.hour_index + 1) hour) group by h.hour_index order by h.hour_index

mapper.select: select CHAR(44172, 49884, 44544 USING utf8mb4) as label, count(*) as value from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( (#{period} = 'day' and p.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and p.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and p.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and p.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) ) union all select CHAR(45843, 44544 USING utf8mb4) as label, count(*) as value from comment_tbl c join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id where c.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( (#{period} = 'day' and c.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and c.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and c.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and c.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and c.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and c.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) ) union all select CHAR(44277, 44048 USING utf8mb4) as label, count(*) as value from user_post_like l join post_tbl p on p.post_id = l.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( (#{period} = 'day' and l.created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and l.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'week' and l.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 6 day) and l.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) or (#{period} = 'month' and l.created_at >= date_sub(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 month) and l.created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) )
select member_id, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
mapper.update: update members set name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
select notice_id, title, content, notice_type, created_by_admin_id, updated_by_admin_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from notices_tbl
deleted_at is null
deleted_at is not null
order by created_at desc, notice_id desc limit 500
select notice_id, title, content, notice_type, created_by_admin_id, updated_by_admin_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from notices_tbl where notice_id = #{noticeId} limit 1

select notice_id, title, content, notice_type, created_by_admin_id, updated_by_admin_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from notices_tbl where deleted_at is null and created_at >= date_sub(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), interval 7 day) order by created_at desc, notice_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into notices_tbl ( title, content, notice_type, created_by_admin_id, updated_by_admin_id, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{adminId}, #{adminId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
mapper.update: update notices_tbl set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, updated_by_admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where notice_id = #{noticeId} and deleted_at is null

update notices_tbl set updated_by_admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), deleted_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where notice_id = #{noticeId} and deleted_at is null
